name: HMG SermonScribe v3 — Real-Time Sermon Transcription & Church Intelligence
description: Enterprise-grade, offline-first sermon transcription, live congregation captions, analytics, Bible intelligence, devotionals, prayer wall, and digital bulletins. Zero API cost. Built by HMG Gospel under HMG Concepts.

shortcuts.name: Start Recording
shortcuts.description: Open the editor and begin a new sermon transcription.

shortcuts.description: Open the live congregation caption display.
